title: Campsite Structures
description: Improves exploration by adding naturally spawning campsites!
body:
This mod adds adds campsites into Minecraft, inspired by Stumble Upon: Campsites. If you are wondering where the mod logo was created, I used the help of NightCafe Creator's AI which you can use as well for free!

This is a Neoforge, Forge, and Fabric Mod


Due to Stumble Upon: Campsites only being available in 1.16.5 and some people waiting for an update, I decided to create my own mod that can provide campsites to world generation. Feel free to use this in all your modpacks!

Report bugs here.
All updates on my Twitter. Come say hi!


Features:

This is a mod which adds vanilla friendly campsites (currently only six variants) in the game which can spawn randomly throughout the surface.
It mainly spawns in grassy areas and has some loot.
It is also should be compatible with any other structure mod. Make sure to leave a comment if it isn't so I can try and fix it!

Currently added are the Armorer, Butcher, Cartographer, Cleric, Farmer, and Fisher Campsites.
Planned are the Fletcher, Leatherworker, Librarian, Stone Mason, Nitwit, and Shepherd Campsites.
